message.content:
This movie website design (mobile app interface) has a **dark theme** with a sleek, modern aesthetic focused on showcasing a single movie ("The Race"). Here’s a detailed breakdown:  


### 1. **Layout & Structure**  
- **Top Section**:  
  - A **back arrow icon** (left) for navigation.  
  - A **bookmark icon** (right, red) for saving the movie.  
  - A **movie poster/banner** with the title “CURSA” (stylized, colorful text) spanning the width.  

- **Movie Info Header**:  
  - Title: *“The Race”* (bold, white text).  
  - Metadata: *2025* (year, white), *7.2* (rating, red star icon + white text), *97 minute* (duration, clock icon + white text).  
  - Genres: *Action, Adventure, Thriller* (gray rounded buttons, white text).  

- **Action Buttons (Row)**:  
  Four icons with labels (white text on black background):  
  - *Detail* (red document icon)  
  - *Stream* (white play icon)  
  - *Download* (white download icon)  
  - *Explore* (white thumbs-up icon)  

- **Review Section**:  
  - Header: *“Review”* (white text).  
  - Title: *“Cursa (2025) The Race”* (white text).  
  - Rating: *“+++++”* (5 stars, white text).  
  - Review snippet: Text in a non-Latin script (likely Burmese) + *“View More”* (red text, clickable).  

- **Additional Info**:  
  - *“Director :”* (white text, label).  
  - *“Tags :”* (white text, label).  
  - *“Casts”* (white text, header).  

- **Cast Thumbnails**:  
  Three circular images with names:  
  - *Cristina Ștefania Codreanu*  
  - *Codin Maticiuc*  
  - *Denis Hanganu*  


### 2. **Colors**  
- **Background**: Black (dominant, for contrast).  
- **Text**: White (primary) + Red (accent for “View More,” bookmark, and rating star).  
- **Buttons/Icons**: Gray (genre tags), red (detail icon, bookmark), white (stream/download/explore icons).  


### 3. **UI Components**  
- **Icons**: Navigation (back), bookmark, play, download, thumbs-up, document (detail).  
- **Buttons**: Genre tags (rounded, gray), action buttons (icon + text), “View More” (text link).  
- **Images**: Movie poster, cast thumbnails (circular).  
- **Text Elements**: Titles, metadata, labels, review text, cast names.  


### 4. **Features Visible**  
- Movie details (title, year, rating, duration, genres).  
- Action options (detail, stream, download, explore).  
- Review system (rating, snippet, “View More”).  
- Cast information (thumbnails + names).  
- Navigation (back arrow) and bookmarking (save movie).  


This design prioritizes **readability** (high contrast) and **quick access** to key movie info/action buttons, with a dark theme to emphasize visual content (poster, cast images).
